title: FTE
description: Forced To Explore is a hard modpack that introduces a bunch of new mechanics and functionality to the existing things in the game
body:
List of features:
- custom villager trades
- custom recipes for many items/blocks
- progression system using lvl caps (requirements)
- revamped battle system using the **Better Combat** mod
- animations using **Fresh Animations**, compatibility with mods such as **Villager Guards**
- revamped tress using **Dynamic Trees**, compatibility with **Upgrade Aquatic** and **BetterEnd**
- a few mods from fabric such as: **Scout, BetterEnd, BetterNether, Trinkets**...
- dynamic seasons
- thirst and body temperature system from **Tough as Nails**
- new health system from **First Aid**
- revamped fishing system
- new forging method for weapons, tools and armor
- special movement from **Parcool!** mod
- new background music thanks to **Dynamic Music Updated**
- boats now have to be build and cannot be crafted
- **new quests** that guide the player (**heracles** mod)
- animals now need to processed in order to get thei meat, hide and bones
